title: BIOREADER: a Retrieval-Enhanced Text-to-Text Transformer for Biomedical Literature
research_areas: T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
T11 Information Extraction, Named Entity Recognition, Relationship Extraction and Event Detection
